draft_subject: Re: Can Pro handle three stores?
draft_body: Hi Maya Lin, thanks for writing in. Pro covers up to five storefronts under one account when they share the same billing owner. Separate companies need separate subscriptions. I left this as a draft for review before it goes out.

draft_subject: Re: Move my booking to next week
draft_body: Hi Owen Hart, thanks for writing in. Customers can move a booking once without a fee if the new slot is at least 24 hours away and has available capacity. I left this as a draft for review before it goes out.
